final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand color and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: clean brand guidelines layout, flat design, editorial style sheet format
Subject: 染秋 (RAN QIU) brand identity system showing primary color swatch, secondary color palette, and typography hierarchy
Composition: centered layout with color blocks arranged in a grid, type specimens below, generous white space
Color palette: warm autumn tones (terracotta, amber, golden ochre) as primary; muted sage green, soft cream, dusty rose as secondary accents; all colors derived from osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, and oolong tea references
Materials/textures: flat matte color swatches, clean vector typography, no gradients unless subtle
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must display hex codes or CMYK values alongside each color; Chinese characters must be legible at small sizes; Latin and Chinese type pairing must feel harmonious
Avoid: generic stock color palettes; neon or cool-toned colors; overly decorative frames; western-centric autumn clichés (pumpkins, Halloween); complex illustrations that distract from the color/type system
